name: Chicken Stew W/Pepper & Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 pound boned and skinned chicken breast halves, cut up
4 medium carrots, cut into 1 inch pieces
1 (8 1/4 oz) can pineapple chunks in juice, drained; reserve juice
1 medium red bell pepper (about 1 cup), cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chicken, carrots, broth, gingerroot, brown sugar, soy sauce, allspice and red pepper flakes in a crockpot.
2. Cover and cook on low heat setting for 7 to 8 hours or until vegetables are tender and chicken is no longer pink in the center.
3. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with reserved pineapple juice. Stir into chicken mixture gradually.
4. Add pineapple chunks and bell pepper. Cover and cook on high heat setting for about 15 minutes (I add the green pepper about 45 minutes before serving) or until slightly thickened and bubbly.
5. Serve with rice.
